rationale: Pull the pre-state well-formedness invariants (`endpoint_inv`, `thread_inv`) into scope so that `pre_self_.thread_dom().contains(victim_thread)` and `pre_self_.container_dom().contains(owning)` are known facts — this is what the previous attempt was missing for the `subtree_set` forall to instantiate at `owning`. Then open the full ensures-antecedent in an `if` branch and co-trigger every cross-run `get_proc`/`get_container`/`get_thread`/`get_endpoint` equality via `pre_self_` so z3 has direct witnesses for the determinism conclusion.
